verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Pain and grief and poverty still in Bitterness and anxiety, the sin Draw me down in the mud again; Darkness and the loneliness brake in In my heart now I'm a part from Him I am crawling and I felt the shame; But I find His hand again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can felt the heavy chain on me I am cold and shuddering: Oh Je' I am crying: Jesus save, save me! Then a love I never felt before Lifts me up and give me strength and more Then I hear: I'll never let you go! I thank you my sweet Jesus for making me hole!
